title: Senior Software Engineer - IndiaMart - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - IndiaMart - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? IndiaMart in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IndiaMart:
IndiaMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart!
